reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del playero que estuvo hoy 11/01/21 a las 22:00 hs.
Habitación con baño privado, súper completa. Agua caliente, lugar climatizado. Cuenta con cochera.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the attendant who was there today, January 11, 2021, at 10:00 PM.
Room with private bathroom, fully equipped. Hot water, air-conditioned. Includes parking.
